mapper.select:
SELECT ct.*, c.name AS customer_name FROM crm_contact ct LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON ct.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
ct.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (ct.name LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%' OR ct.phone LIKE '%' || #{keywords} || '%')
AND ct.customer_id = #{customerId} AND ct.is_decision_maker = #{isDecisionMaker}::boolean
ORDER BY ct.sort_order ASC NULLS LAST, ct.created_at DESC
